title: Brollo
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image= |name=Brollo |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] |species=[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hey, hey Brollo! It's been a while. You ready to lose this weeks pay?"
"''[Snorts reply]''"
"Yah, I know the commander ordered the fights to stop, but he's not around, is he?|An Imperial and Brollo|[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]}} '''Brollo''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who worked for [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] division of the [[Seven Dark Jedi|Imperial remnants]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. He wore a bloodsucking [[morrt]] on each bicep as a symbol of status. He was stationed on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] to guard the [[Katarn family|Katarn]] house. His cousin was [[Blotho]], who participated in fights that the Imperials and mercenaries would bet on. He was hired by [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] and during his search for the [[Valley of the Jedi]] he was assigned to guard the [[Katarn estate]] along with [[Imperial Remnant]] forces. He used to participate in dueling bets with [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]]. During their patrol duty in the estate, an Imperial invited him to another bet, and produced a [[datapad/Legends|datapad]] in order to choose between [[Kine (stormtrooper)|Kine]] and his cousin [[Blotho]]. Right then, the [[droid/Legends|droid]] [[WeeGee]] broke the backdoor of the kitchen; after a moment of shock, the two were reaching for their weapons when Brollo was shot by [[Kyle Katarn]] with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shot. His partner followed soon after. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1st}} *[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |it=Brollo }} [[Category:Gamorreans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mercenaries]]
